name: RPM Ventures
notes: Seed and early-stage VC firm based in Ann Arbor, MI since 2000. Focus on B2B enterprise, marketplaces, and automotive IT.

name: RTP Global
notes: Global VC firm with offices in New York, London, Dubai, and Bangalore. Multiple sources cite New York (885 3rd Ave) as primary US HQ; PitchBook lists London. Using NY as primary.

name: Sabrina Hahn
notes: This appears to be an individual investor (Sabrina Hahn, founder of SH Fund), not a company. Based in New York. Named to 2026 Forbes Midas Seed List. Website is her personal site. Low confidence since the CRM entry is a person's name rather than a firm.

name: Sage View
notes: Ambiguous name — no exact 'Sage View' (two words) company found. Closest matches are Sageview Capital (Greenwich CT / Palo Alto CA, growth equity) and SageView Advisory Group (Newport Beach CA, retirement advisory). Cannot confirm which entity this record refers to without more context.

name: Sansiri
notes: Sansiri Public Company Limited is a Thai real estate developer headquartered in the Wattana district of Bangkok, Thailand. Foreign company — city and state left null per rules.

name: Scout Ventures
notes: Early-stage VC focused on frontier/dual-use technologies built by veterans and intelligence community members. Founded 2009, now headquartered in Austin, TX (previously associated with New York).

name: Second Century Ventures
notes: Strategic VC arm of the National Association of Realtors (NAR), investing in real estate technology. Based in Chicago, IL. Runs the REACH scale-up program globally.

name: Sheer Health
notes: Health insurance simplification platform headquartered in New York, NY (207 West 79th Street).

name: Silas Capital
notes: Growth equity and venture capital firm focused on consumer brands. HQ at 1330 6th Ave Fl 14, New York, NY 10019.

name: SIZE
notes: Generic name with no domain provided. Could not identify a specific company named SIZE. Multiple unrelated companies use this name. No reliable match found.

name: South Park Commons
notes: Technology community and early-stage fund based in San Francisco, CA (380 Brannan Street). Described as a membership community for technologists and founders.

name: Starting Line VC
notes: Chicago-based early-stage consumer VC firm founded in 2018 by Ezra Galston. Has raised three funds totaling ~$77M.
